title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING CERTAIN APPROPRIATIONS FOR PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS UNDER THE HEADING "BATANGAS," SUBSECTION (a), TITLE "A. MISCELLANEOUS," SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED SEVENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3510 / 49 OG No. 9, 3804 (September, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 961, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING CERTAIN APPROPRIATIONS FOR PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS UNDER THE HEADING "BATANGAS," SUBSECTION (a), TITLE "A. MISCELLANEOUS," SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIX HUNDRED SEVENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sub-heading "Other Public Works Projects," under the heading "Batangas," subsection (

a

), Title "A. Miscellaneous," section one of Republic Act Numbered Six hundred seventy, is amended by increasing the appropriation for items numbers fourteen and twenty-three and eliminating items seventeen and twenty-one.

"14. Repair of Mapalad-na-bato Parents-Teachers Association School Building,

Nasugbu

Pl.000.00

"23. Repair Bulihan Parents-Teachers Association School Building, Nasugbu

P1,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1953.
